title: usecase.Move (cascading new IDs + alias bookkeeping + ref rewriting)
acceptance_criteria: Procedure per §8.2: compute new IDs, mv files, update parent_id/project_id, append old IDs to aliases[], scan all items for old IDs in dependencies/blocks and rewrite, append moved event with full mapping, bump version on every touched item.
Atomic at the workspace level via OpLog: either all changes apply or none do.
Tests assert mapping correctness on a 3-deep hierarchy.
